refs_used.duty: Fenshou identity only: black-red armored attacker, brief edge or foreground follow-through presence only.
Shuangji identity only: blue-white-silver armored defender already moving backward over visible floor distance.

continuity_source.continuity_rule: Beat A ends on static contact / hit-stop; this Beat B begins after that contact moment with immediate backward travel.

revision_source.revision_reason: K270G original B3 submit failed before task creation; K270H recommended a safe/simplified no-submit revision before any retry or B1 submit.

route_purpose: Create a no-submit M2V package for the R02A2 dynamic fly-out Beat B after existing Variant A contact/hit-stop material.
diagnostic_purpose: Focus on clear backward travel, readable distance, wet-floor response, and identity continuity while reducing provider-sensitive wording.
safe_revision_notes: Simplified sentence structure from original B3.
Reduced intense collision and harm language.
Preserved result-only movement after the prior contact beat.
Preserved wide enough framing, rainy temple continuity, clear distance, and wet-floor feedback.
Kept only essential negatives to avoid over-stacking.
strict_negatives: no tight camera that hides travel distance
route_notes: B3 safe/simplified remains primary because it begins after hit-stop and avoids requiring the model to solve precise contact again.
Show Shuangji already moving backward over readable distance.
Fenshou may appear only as a brief follow-through presence, not prolonged contact.
B1 remains backup only and is not submitted by this package.
